scenarios.rationale: The regression engine's docstrings claim the red-zone-opportunity expected-TD model beats the yardage baseline out-of-sample. This runs the real backtest (fit on 2024, score on 2025 from cached parquet) and asserts red-zone MAE is strictly lower — substantiating the claim instead of trusting a comment. Degrades to a non-crashing miss when the parquet cache is absent.
